item.tacz_mtga.wooden_turret.desc: Primitive wooden turret with basic tracking.
item.tacz_mtga.upgrade_range.desc: Enables 'Scope' mode, doubling the turret's range!
item.tacz_mtga.upgrade_speed.desc: Makes your turret smoking fast, increasing fire rate by 20%!
item.tacz_mtga.upgrade_ammo.desc: Provides infinite ammo but reduces damage to 15%.
